title: Office Level Studies
description: Four independent office-as-game-level studies testing top-down layout, patrol logic, objective UI, and HUD layering without reference dependencies.
creative_direction: Each image treats a different corporate workspace as a playable stealth mission board, emphasizing readable routes, NPC behavior, objective hierarchy, and UI overlays rather than combat spectacle.

en.title: Office Level Studies
en.description: Four independent office-as-game-level studies testing top-down layout, patrol logic, objective UI, and HUD layering without reference dependencies.

zh-CN.title: 办公室关卡单图研究
zh-CN.description: 四张独立办公室游戏化研究,测试俯视布局、巡逻逻辑、任务 UI 和 HUD 叠层。
